design_vision: A dark, moody, and cinematic portfolio combining minimal editorial aesthetics with high-contrast asymmetric layouts. Deep charcoals replace pure black for depth, allowing the photography to act as the primary light source and focal point.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Let the images breathe. Use padding like p-12 or p-24 between major sections.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode A: Tetris Grid for portfolio highlights, masonry for full galleries. Avoid perfect symmetry.

components.header: Crystal Glass variant (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) or Solid background that fades out. Fixed at top. Logo on left, links on right.
components.buttons: Minimalist. 1px solid border, transparent background. Hover: bg-white text-black. transition-all duration-300.
components.cards: Cardless design for pricing and services. Use subtle 1px border on bottom or left to anchor the content instead of full boxes.
components.gallery_filters: Text-based navigation. Active state is white, inactive is gray. Underline animation on hover.
components.lightbox: Full-screen dark overlay (bg-black/95) with minimalist UI (close, next, prev).
components.admin_dashboard: Clean, utilitarian, grid-based. Use Shadcn UI for forms, tables, dialogs (Upload Modal).

motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Image grayscale to color on hover, or slight scale-up (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden containers.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Slow image reveals. Fade in up for text elements.

icons: lucide-react for minimal, stroke-based icons (e.g., arrow right, close, menu, instagram).
instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing/portfolio layouts. Avoid Shadcn for creative grids.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for the Admin/Upload section (Forms, Inputs, Dialogs, Tables).
Install and use Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Install framer-motion for slow image reveals, parallax on scroll, and category filter transitions.
Ensure all fonts are imported from Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond and Outfit).
The Hero section must NOT use a generic centered card. Use an asymmetric layout with a large striking image, photographer name 'flicksfromnai', and editorial typography.
Gallery needs a lightbox viewer (framer-motion AnimatePresence is great for this).
Data-testid attributes MUST be added to all interactive elements for testing.
Contact section has NO form. Only email, IG link, and location, styled elegantly.
Use the provided image URLs as placeholders in the frontend. Admin section will allow uploading new ones.
Use .js files (JSX syntax) for all React components as per the project environment, NOT .tsx files.
